TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dana_Andrews, title = Dana_Andrews, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dana_Andrews} }

S.FORM: Dana Andrews kawas tay 1909, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Dana Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) qnxan nya Dana Andrews hintgan beh southern Mississippi na 農莊. cinngasal musa Huntsville Walker qalang , Steve Forrest hiya mtswe nya. Andrews mqwas beh Huntsville,Sam Houston krahu' pqwasan biru.mcbaq ssunanu mlahang koba maki Houston uzi.1931 kawas hiya musa Los Angeles,California musa' hmkangi' ppqwas na ppkayal.raral ga,hiya cingay mtzyaw nya,ru maki Van Nuys qalang halan ptkura abura mtzyaw. qyanux nya nanak 1932 kawas 12 byacing 31 ryax, Andrews ru Janet Murray wal kekong la. (Janet Murray wayal kyapun haybyo.) hiya laqi mlikuy David ga semong mqwas ru balay mqwas na squilq.pyano wal mhuqil la. 1939 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Andrews ru Mary Todd wal kekong la. maki cyugal laqi nya, lalu ga Katharine, Stephen ru Susan. 20 kawas ga, qutux ngasal maki Toluca Lake, California . pucing kalas nya, Andrews nbwan Alzheimer's . 1922 kawas 12 byacing 17 ryax, hiya wal mhuqil haybyo. 2003 kawas bes nya, wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Dana Andrews kawas tay 1909, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Dana Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) qnxan nya Dana Andrews hintgan beh southern Mississippi na 農莊. cinngasal musa Huntsville Walker qalang , Steve Forrest hiya mtswe nya. Andrews mqwas beh Huntsville,Sam Houston krahu' pqwasan biru.mcbaq ssunanu mlahang koba maki Houston uzi.1931 kawas hiya musa Los Angeles,California musa' hmkangi' ppqwas na ppkayal.raral ga,hiya cingay mtzyaw nya,ru maki Van Nuys qalang halan ptkura abura mtzyaw. qyanux nya nanak 1932 kawas 12 byacing 31 ryax, Andrews ru Janet Murray wal kekong la. (Janet Murray wayal kyapun haybyo.) hiya laqi mlikuy David ga semong mqwas ru balay mqwas na squilq.pyano wal mhuqil la. 1939 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Andrews ru Mary Todd wal kekong la. maki cyugal laqi nya, lalu ga Katharine, Stephen ru Susan. 20 kawas ga, qutux ngasal maki Toluca Lake, California . pucing kalas nya, Andrews nbwan Alzheimer's . 1922 kawas 12 byacing 17 ryax, hiya wal mhuqil haybyo. 2003 kawas bes nya, wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ana an*rews~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *ana an*rews~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja *ana an*rews~ɕ ħintɣan βeħ s~ɕoutħern mis~ɕs~ɕis~ɕs~ɕippi na **. ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa ħunts~ɕ*ille walker qalaŋ , s~ɕte*e *orres~ɕt ħija mts~ɕwe nja. an*rews~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βeħ ħunts~ɕ*ille,s~ɕam ħous~ɕton kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.mʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕs~ɕunanu mlaħaŋ koβa maki ħous~ɕton uzi.**** kawas~ɕ ħija mus~ɕa los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ,ʦ~ʨali*ornia mus~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋiʔ ppqwas~ɕ na ppkajal.raral ɣa,ħija ʦ~ʨiŋaj mtzjaw nja,ru maki *an nujs~ɕ qalaŋ ħalan ptkura aβura mtzjaw. qjanux nja nanak **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, an*rews~ɕ ru *anet murraj wal kekoŋ la. (*anet murraj wajal kjapun ħajβjo.) ħija laqi mlikuj *a*i* ɣa s~ɕemoŋ mqwas~ɕ ru βalaj mqwas~ɕ na s~ɕquilq.pjano wal mħuqil la. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, an*rews~ɕ ru marj to** wal kekoŋ la. maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nja, lalu ɣa katħarine, s~ɕtepħen ru s~ɕus~ɕan. ** kawas~ɕ ɣa, qutux ŋas~ɕal maki toluʦ~ʨa lake, ʦ~ʨali*ornia . puʦ~ʨiŋ kalas~ɕ nja, an*rews~ɕ nβwan alzħeimerʔs~ɕ . **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, ħija wal mħuqil ħajβjo. **** kawas~ɕ βes~ɕ nja, wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
